title: SkyGrid - Block Grid Survival
description: Survive in a world of scattered floating blocks. Every resource is one wrong step from the void. Based on the classic SethBling concept.
body:
# 🔲 SkyGrid — Chaos in Every Direction

Remember SethBling's SkyGrid? We brought it to multiplayer.

SkyGrid generates a world where every four blocks, a random block floats in a grid pattern — stretching infinitely in every direction. Dirt, diamond ore, lava, TNT, spawners, water — all scattered randomly across a deadly void.

Your players must navigate this chaotic grid, gathering resources block by block, building bridges between valuable finds, and trying not to fall.

## 🎮 What Makes SkyGrid Unique?

- 🎲 **Random block grid** — every block type in Minecraft can appear, placed in a 4-block grid
- 💀 **Void below** — one wrong step and you're gone
- 🌋 **Dangerous surprises** — lava, TNT, and hostile mob spawners appear randomly
- 💎 **Resource hunting** — spotting that diamond ore three blocks away and figuring out how to reach it
- 👥 **Multiplayer teams** — cooperate to gather resources and build a base

## ⚙️ Features

- **Configurable grid** — control which blocks appear, their probability, and grid spacing
- **Multiple dimensions** — Nether and End SkyGrid worlds available
- **Full team system** — island protection, roles, and permissions
- **All BentoBox addons** — challenges, levels, warps, and more
- **Free and open source**

## 📦 Installation

Requires **BentoBox** on a **Paper** server.

1. Install [BentoBox](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bentobox)
2. Place `SkyGrid.jar` into `plugins/BentoBox/addons/`
3. Restart
4. `/grid` to start playing

📖 Docs: [docs.bentobox.world](https://docs.bentobox.world) | 💬 Discord: [discord.gg/BentoBoxWorld](https://discord.gg/BentoBoxWorld) | 🐛 Issues: [GitHub](https://github.com/BentoBoxWorld/SkyGrid/issues)
